dj_text: Switching from summer melancholy to The Midnight Mirror. It's a vibe pivot. I'm a professional. Last one in the queue coming up.
commercial_text: Looking for love? Try That Pirate Bot DJ Mingle — the dating app where everyone is either a bot or emotionally unavailab
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: The Midnight Mirror
